message:
feat(server): ATC population cold-start sync, supervisor config externalization

ATC sync:
- Periodic (60s) atc_sync_population_from_db hydrates ATC from database
- atc_sync_agent_snapshot with monotonic merge for individual agents
- atc_observe_activity_with_project auto-registers unknown agents
- Ensures pre-existing agents tracked from startup

HTTP supervisor:
- Replace remaining hardcoded probe/restart constants with Config fields
- restart_backoff_ms and reset_probe_state accept parameters/config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
